raw_consumer_statement:
I contacted a business called XXXX on XX/XX/2023. XXXX was listed on line as a customer service representative of Frontier Airlines. I was told over the phone, that for a fee of {$99.00}, that they would reverse the fees charged for XXXX air flight tickets, and return the XXXX XXXX, I used to the tickets. I gave them my credit card number at that point, and they charged my credit card the {$99.00}. Then the company did absolutely nothing, for my previous payments for the flight tickets. When I discover I had lost everything paid for the flight tickets, I recontated XXXX at XXXX. I was put on hold for several minutes, then disconnected. I then searched the company online and discovered that it is a total fraud company, and had tried to steal from XXXX of people. I then contact Barclays and reported the fraudulent charge, and gave them all the information, and that I had received absolutely no service from this company. 
Barclays originally reversed the charge, then put the charge back on my account on XX/XX/XXXX. And gave me no information on what I was charged for.I believe Barclays, or someone within Barclays may be a party to this XXXX XXXX. 
Barclays continued to call me to the point of harassment, for more information, after I told them there was no more information. But, would not give me any information on what the service I was charged for. Then sent me some papers that were totally in legible.
